message:
test(engine): comprehensive test enrichment across 14 core modules (~5,300 lines)

Adds extensive inline test suites covering edge cases, invariants,
and integration scenarios for core engine modules:

- activation_lifecycle.rs (+289): State machine transitions, invalid
  state detection, lifecycle event ordering
- cancellation_lifecycle.rs (+218): Cancellation propagation, partial
  cancel, double-cancel idempotency
- capability_token.rs (+151): Token creation, expiry, scope validation,
  capability intersection
- capability_witness.rs (+813): Witness chain verification, tamper
  detection, multi-witness quorum
- controller_composition_matrix.rs (+128): Matrix multiplication,
  identity composition, commutativity checks
- engine_object_id.rs (+116): ID generation uniqueness, parse round-trip,
  prefix validation
- error_code.rs (+149): Error code registry, severity mapping, category
  classification
- extension_host_authority_guard.rs (+209): Authority grant/revoke,
  scope escalation prevention, guard stacking
- migration_kit.rs (+1,119): Migration plan validation, dry-run mode,
  rollback on failure, version compatibility matrix
- mmr_proof.rs (+173): Merkle mountain range proofs, append-only
  verification, peak bagging
- obligation_channel.rs (+184): Channel capacity, backpressure, ordered
  delivery, obligation fulfillment tracking
- privacy_learning_contract.rs (+958): Contract negotiation, privacy
  budget accounting, differential privacy guarantees
- static_analysis_graph.rs (+337): CFG construction, dominator tree,
  loop detection, dead code identification
- structural_causal_model.rs (+279): DAG validation, d-separation,
  intervention do-calculus, counterfactual queries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
